prompt: Continue implementing the plan. Phase 3 specifies creating src/utils/helpers.ts but the directory structure is different than expected â€” there is no src/utils/ directory, only src/lib/.
expected_output: A mismatch report is presented showing plan said vs found, with options A/B/C for the user to choose how to proceed. No silent deviation.
expectations: Detects the mismatch between plan and reality
Presents a structured mismatch report with Plan said / Found / Impact sections
Offers at least two options (adapt approach, update plan, or stop and discuss)
Does NOT silently create src/utils/ or deviate from the plan without user input
Waits for user decision before continuing
